title: Daemon token auth + PSK management endpoints
description: Add token-based authentication to the WebSocket upgrade flow. First message must be { type: 'auth', token: '<hex>' }. Add REST endpoints: POST /api/cowork/generate-psk (creates PSK, stores in Keychain + DB), POST /api/cowork/rotate-token (generates new auth token). Token and PSK are distinct: token authenticates WebSocket, PSK authenticates key exchange.
acceptanceCriteria: WebSocket connection requires auth message within 5 seconds or closes with code 4000
Invalid token closes with code 4000 ('Authentication failed')
Valid token proceeds to key exchange phase
PSK stored in macOS Keychain (credential-cowork-token) and kithkit.db
POST /api/cowork/rotate-token generates new 256-bit auth token, invalidates old
Auth token stored in kithkit.db config table
Token generated on first daemon start if not present
